name: strongremindermeetingtasklist
description: Strong Reminder Meeting Task List for Windows.
author: 路飞

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on dist-electron/main/main.js http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.package:portable: npm run package:portable-dir && npm run icon:win -- release\1.0.6\win-unpacked && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'release/路飞工作清单免安装版 1.0.6.zip') { Remove-Item 'release/路飞工作清单免安装版 1.0.6.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'release/1.0.6/win-unpacked/*' -DestinationPath 'release/路飞工作清单免安装版 1.0.6.zip' -Force"
scripts.package:web: npm run build:web && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'release/路飞工作清单网页版 1.0.6.zip') { Remove-Item 'release/路飞工作清单网页版 1.0.6.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'web-dist/*' -DestinationPath 'release/路飞工作清单网页版 1.0.6.zip' -Force"

portable.artifactName: 路飞工作清单免安装版 ${version}.${ext}
